sentences.target: Je dois aller à l'administration demain matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa ale a ladministʁasjɔ̃ dəmɛ̃ matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je dois aller à l'administration demain matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa ale a ladministʁasjɔ̃ dəmɛ̃ matɛ̃/
translations.en: I have to go to the administration office tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Tengo que ir a la administración mañana por la mañana.
translations.de: Ich muss morgen früh zur Verwaltung gehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天早上得去行政部门。
translations.yue: 我聽日朝早要去行政部門。
translations.ru: Мне нужно завтра утром сходить в администрацию.
translations.pt: Tenho que ir à administração amanhã de manhã.
translations.he: אני צריך ללכת למנהלה מחר בבוקר.
translations.vi: Sáng mai tôi phải đến cơ quan hành chính.
translations.ar: عليّ أن أذهب إلى الإدارة صباح الغد.
translations.nl: Ik moet morgenochtend naar de administratie.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно завтра вранці піти до адміністрації.
translations.hu: Holnap reggel el kell mennem a hivatalba.
translations.hi: मुझे कल सुबह प्रशासन के दफ्तर जाना है.
translations.pl: Muszę jutro rano iść do administracji.
translations.el: Πρέπει να πάω στη διοίκηση αύριο το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg må til administrasjonen i morgen tidlig.
translations.id: Saya harus pergi ke bagian administrasi besok pagi.
translations.sv: Jag måste gå till administrationen i morgon bitti.
translations.ro: Trebuie să merg la administrație mâine dimineață.
translations.cs: Zítra ráno musím jít na úřad.
translations.da: Jeg skal til administrationen i morgen tidlig.
translations.fi: Minun pitää mennä virastoon huomenna aamulla.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、役所に行かなければならない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'devoir'; modal verb expressing obligation toward the infinitive 'aller'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'devoir' (obligation to perform the action).
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase indicating destination/location.
Common noun; preceded by elided definite article 'l’' (< le). Object of the preposition 'à'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause (time of the action).
Common noun used as a temporal complement; forms the time expression 'demain matin'.

sentences.target: L'administration a encore perdu mon dossier.

translations.fr: L'administration a encore perdu mon dossier.
translations.en: The administration lost my file again.
translations.es: La administración perdió mi expediente otra vez.
translations.de: Die Verwaltung hat meine Akte schon wieder verloren.
translations.it: L’amministrazione ha perso di nuovo il mio fascicolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 行政部门又把我的档案弄丢了。
translations.yue: 行政部門又搞失咗我份檔案。
translations.pt: A administração perdeu o meu processo outra vez.
translations.he: המנהלה שוב איבדה את התיק שלי.
translations.vi: Cơ quan hành chính lại làm mất hồ sơ của tôi.
translations.nl: De administratie is mijn dossier weer kwijt.
translations.hu: A hivatal megint elvesztette az aktámat.
translations.hi: प्रशासन ने मेरी फ़ाइल फिर से खो दी.
translations.el: Η διοίκηση έχασε πάλι τον φάκελό μου.
translations.nb: Administrasjonen har mistet mappen min igjen.
translations.id: Bagian administrasi kehilangan berkas saya lagi.
translations.sv: Administrationen har tappat min akt igen.
translations.da: Administrationen har mistet min sag igen.
translations.ja: 役所がまた私の書類をなくした。

tokens.explanation: Common noun with elided definite article 'L’' (< le); syntactic subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; forms a compound past with the past participle 'perdu'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates repetition.
Past participle of 'perdre'; main lexical verb in a compound tense with 'a'. Takes a direct object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; modifies 'dossier'.
Common noun; direct object of 'perdu'.

sentences.target: Tu travailles à l'administration depuis longtemps.

translations.fr: Tu travailles à l'administration depuis longtemps.
translations.en: Have you been working at the administration long?
translations.es: ¿Llevas mucho tiempo trabajando en la administración?
translations.de: Arbeitest du schon lange bei der Verwaltung?
translations.zh-Hans: 你在行政部门工作很久了吗？
translations.yue: 你喺行政部門做咗好耐未？
translations.pt: Trabalhas na administração há muito tempo?
translations.he: אתה עובד במנהלה כבר הרבה זמן?
translations.vi: Bạn làm ở cơ quan hành chính lâu chưa?
translations.ar: هل تعمل في الإدارة منذ وقت طويل؟
translations.nl: Werk je al lang bij de administratie?
translations.hi: क्या तुम प्रशासन में लंबे समय से काम कर रहे हो?
translations.el: Εργάζεσαι στη διοίκηση εδώ και πολύ καιρό;
translations.nb: Har du jobbet i administrasjonen lenge?
translations.id: Apakah kamu sudah lama bekerja di bagian administrasi?
translations.sv: Har du jobbat på administrationen länge?
translations.da: Har du arbejdet i administrationen længe?
translations.ja: あなたは役所で長く働いていますか。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'travailler'; main verb.
Preposition introducing a location complement.
Common noun with elided definite article 'l’' (< le); object of the preposition 'à'.
Preposition marking origin point of a duration; introduces the time expression 'depuis longtemps'.
Temporal adverb; complement to 'depuis' indicating extended duration.

sentences.target: On attend l'administration pour valider le contrat.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ ladministʁasjɔ̃ puʁ valide lə kɔ̃tʁa/

translations.fr: On attend l'administration pour valider le contrat.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ ladministʁasjɔ̃ puʁ valide lə kɔ̃tʁa/
translations.en: We're waiting for the administration to approve the contract.
translations.es: Estamos esperando a que la administración apruebe el contrato.
translations.de: Wir warten darauf, dass die Verwaltung den Vertrag genehmigt.
translations.it: Aspettiamo che l’amministrazione approvi il contratto.
translations.ko: 우리는 행정기관이 계약을 승인하기를 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在等行政部门批准合同。
translations.yue: 我哋等緊行政部門批核合約。
translations.ru: Мы ждём, когда администрация утвердит договор.
translations.pt: Estamos à espera que a administração aprove o contrato.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים שהמנהלה תאשר את החוזה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang chờ cơ quan hành chính phê duyệt hợp đồng.
translations.ar: نحن ننتظر موافقة الإدارة على العقد.
translations.nl: We wachten tot de administratie het contract goedkeurt.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо, поки адміністрація затвердить контракт.
translations.hu: Arra várunk, hogy a hivatal jóváhagyja a szerződést.
translations.hi: हम प्रशासन से अनुबंध की मंजूरी का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε τη διοίκηση να εγκρίνει τη σύμβαση.
translations.nb: Vi venter på at administrasjonen skal godkjenne kontrakten.
translations.id: Kami menunggu bagian administrasi menyetujui kontrak.
translations.sv: Vi väntar på att administrationen ska godkänna kontraktet.
translations.ro: Așteptăm ca administrația să aprobe contractul.
translations.da: Vi venter på, at administrationen godkender kontrakten.
translations.ja: 私たちは役所が契約を承認するのを待っている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'; subject of the clause.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; main verb, transitive, taking a direct object.
Common noun with elided definite article 'l’' (< le); direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition marking purpose; introduces an infinitive clause ('pour valider ...').
Infinitive verb; complement of 'pour' expressing the intended purpose.
Definite article; determiner of 'contrat'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'valider'.

Administrasjonen har mistet mappen min igjen.
Har du jobbet i administrasjonen lenge?
Vi venter på at administrasjonen skal godkjenne kontrakten.
